summary: Verified all 3 bug fixes for Performance Tracker: 1) Pipeline status dots now use correct per-status colors from useLeadStatuses hook (green for Qualified, yellow for Contacted), 2) Activity metrics now correctly query 'activities' collection - Sneha Kumar (Kolkata) Feb 2026 shows Emails: 1, 3) Pipeline row click navigates with both status AND assigned_to filters in URL. All fixes working correctly.

success_rate.backend: 100% - Activity metrics API returns correct data from activities collection
success_rate.frontend: 100% - All 3 bug fixes verified via UI testing

seed_data_creation: No seed data created - used existing test data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 Performance Tracker bug fixes verified. Pipeline status colors, activity metrics from activities collection, and pipeline navigation with assigned_to filter all working correctly.

Bug_1_Pipeline_Status_Colors.description: Pipeline status dots now use correct per-status colors from useLeadStatuses hook
Bug_1_Pipeline_Status_Colors.evidence: HTML shows for Qualified status, matching dashboard color
Bug_1_Pipeline_Status_Colors.code_fix: PerformanceTracker.js line 401-402: const statusInfo = getStatusById(row.status); const dotColor = statusInfo?.bg || 'bg-slate-400';

Bug_2_Activity_Metrics_Collection.description: Activity metrics now query 'activities' collection instead of 'lead_activities'
Bug_2_Activity_Metrics_Collection.evidence: API response for Sneha Kumar (Kolkata) Feb 2026: {emails: 1, unique_emails: 1}
Bug_2_Activity_Metrics_Collection.code_fix: performance.py lines 186-195: db.activities.count_documents() instead of db.lead_activities
Bug_2_Activity_Metrics_Collection.test_data: Plan: H2 2026 Sales Target, Resource: Sneha Kumar (Kolkata), Month: February 2026

Bug_3_Pipeline_Navigation_Filter.description: Pipeline row click now includes assigned_to parameter in navigation URL
Bug_3_Pipeline_Navigation_Filter.evidence: URL after click: /leads?status=qualified&assigned_to=sales-analytics-view, Leads page shows both STATUS=Qualified and SALES RESOURCE=Rajesh Kumar filters applied

Bug_4_Status_Labels.description: Pipeline status labels use getStatusLabel for proper formatting
Bug_4_Status_Labels.evidence: UI shows 'Qualified' and 'Contacted' (capitalized) instead of raw 'qualified'/'contacted'
